headline: Huggies® Introduces "Expensive $h*t", Putting Luxury Items in the Blast Zone and Letting Babies Do The Rest
summary: Huggies® has launched its latest campaign, "Expensive $h*t," a one-hour event to showcase the strength of its all-around blowout protection.
